headline: Stock Market Today: Dow Closes Up 275 Points; Western Digital Roars Higher After Pullback Entry (Live Coverage)

headline: KLA (KLAC) Is Up 10.0% After Enlarging Buyback And Supply-Chain Relief Is The AI Case Stronger?
summary: KLA recently announced a new US$7.00 billion share repurchase authorization, lifting its total buyback capacity to nearly US$11.00 billion, while semiconductor suppliers benefited from easing U.S.–Iran tensions and the reopening of the Strait of Hormuz, a critical route for materials used in chip production. This combination of an expanded buyback program and improved supply-chain confidence highlights how capital returns and geopolitical conditions can jointly influence KLA’s outlook. We’ll...

headline: Why Is KLA Corporation (KLAC) Stock Soaring Today
summary: Shares of semiconductor manufacturing equipment maker KLA Corporation (NASDAQ:KLAC) jumped 7.4% in the afternoon session as semiconductor stocks rallied in response to the de-escalation of the U.S.-Iran conflict.
